author: Luis Mendez
description: Plan, run, and review provider-native AI agents inside your vault, keeping every conversation and edit as Markdown you own. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Luis Mendez
manifest.description: Plan, run, and review provider-native AI agents inside your vault, keeping every conversation and edit as Markdown you own.
manifest.name: Specorator

name: Specorator

releases.author: Luis85
releases.description:
## What's Changed
- chore(release): 1.2.2
- fix(cursor): reap exited detached groups; watch session token for env invalidation
- Implemented the Cursor ACP code-quality refactor:
- fix(chat): restore FileContext session state on init-failure rollback
- fix(tasks): assign stable ledger ids on the entry so retries dedupe
- fix(cursor): strip the model prefix before the usage window fallback
- fix(chat): clear the hydration spinner on New Chat
- fix(chat): clear the abandoned switch draft on New Chat
- fix(cursor): scope ACP sessions to selected external-context roots
- fix(cursor): match advertised models against the active endpoint's catalog
- fix(chat): abort in-flight hydration on New Chat so a late load can't rebind the tab
- fix(cursor): reap the ACP process group on POSIX so tool grandchildren don't orphan
- fix(cursor): fingerprint credentials in the model-catalog cache key
- fix(chat): recompute trailing render window on in-place transcript truncation
- fix(cursor,conversations): clear delete tombstone on failure; key model catalog to active endpoint
- style(chat): commit the ConversationController comment trim (LOC baseline match)
- fix(history): do not seed the hydration cache when the triggering caller is cancelled
- fix(chat): defer markCurrentNoteSent to post-runtime; fix LOC baselines
- fix(chat): preserve pending switch draft across rapid re-switches; restore CI gates
- fix(chat): restore the original draft, not the folded quick-action prompt, on rollback
- dedup & Cleanup Removed ui/vue/transcript/blocks/subagentViewModel.ts (no re-export stub) Tests now import from @/features/chat/rendering/subagentViewModel Added truncateWebSearchSummary unit tests
- fix(chat): restore image attachments when a send's runtime init fails
- fix: gate usage recovery on revision; don't cancel concurrent image adds; block WO capacity mid-restore
- fix(conversations): revision-guard hydration commit; tombstone deletes after quiesce
- fix(context): keep external directory roots when a file inside them is attached
- fix: base-url cache key, delete-tombstone rollback, restore coverage
- fix conversation history hydration bug
- fix(chat): gate the fallback action bar on a markdown host, not just a text item
- fix(chat): fall back to a message-level action bar when a response has no text block
- fix(cursor): notify vault from diff path on edit; prefer inline plan over stale file
- fix(chat): co-locate assistant action bar with the copy button as one hover row
- fix(cursor): seed delete path from title when delete-as-edit carries no rawInput
- fix(cursor): keep model-window on prompt-usage turns; classify delete-titled edits
- fix(cursor): guard update_todos on turn cancel; reconcile capture toggle live
- style(cursor): fold create_plan cancel rationale into the docstring (LOC cap)
- fix(cursor): check turn-cancel signal before emitting create_plan text
- test(chat): lock switch-to-history transcript render through the real projection
- fix(chat): reveal the assistant message action bar on hover again
- fix(cursor): tree-kill the ACP process on shutdown so Windows grandchildren don't leak
- fix(env): force a runtime respawn on env-invalidation so persistent CLIs drop stale credentials
- test(env): assert custom-Path containment, not equality (Windows CI)
- fix(env): read custom PATH case-insensitively so a lowercase `Path=` survives
- fix(chat): popout-safe choice focus, hide empty welcome block, unmount inline cards that resolve during mount
- refactor(env): mirror Claude's full-env spawn for Cursor, Opencode, and Codex
- chore(chat): re-lock complexity ratchet for the finished-turn identity-refresh fix
- fix(chat): keep the finished message identity-refreshed through finalization so interrupted/collapsed text renders
- chore(chat): re-lock LOC ceilings for the round-4 correctness fixes
- fix(chat): scope runtime-error retry, dedupe file-link open to delegation, restore streaming math deferral
- fix(cursor): honor a Stop pressed during the prior-prompt serialization wait
- fix(chat): rebind keyboard nav to the Vue scroll host + restore collapsed-streaming
- refactor(chat): extract shared FileLink to dedupe tool file-link decoration (fixes quality ratchet)
- fix(cursor): reset turn metadata after the prior-prompt wait, not at turn entry
- fix(cursor): prefer Git Bash over PowerShell as the Windows shell executor
- feat(chat): consolidate provider-lifecycle spawn/wait/close tools into a subagent card
- fix(chat): register transcript file-link handler + refresh nested subagent tool identities
- feat(chat): restore clickable vault file-links in tool summaries + file-search lines
- refactor(chat): extract pure helpers + delete orphaned imperative render functions (restores Jest coverage)
- fix(cursor): persist advertised model catalog so cold-resume model changes apply
- fix(chat): suppress retry on auto-turn runtime errors + restore custom streaming-indicator label
- fix(chat): preserve loaded window during streaming + rewire nav sidebar to the Vue scroll host
- fix(cursor): map plan outcome before cancelling so approve-new-session stays rejected
- fix(env): preserve pathOverride when a customEnv PATH variant differs in case
- chore(chat): DOM-contract test, ratchet re-lock, ADR + CLAUDE docs for the transcript island
- fix(cursor): single PATH key in child env + handle cursor/update_todos as a request
- test(chat): migrate transcript scaling guard to the Vue lane
- refactor(chat): delete the dead imperative transcript renderer + DOM-pointer fields
- fix(chat): refresh streamed/async-mutated message identity so the Vue transcript re-renders live
- fix(cursor): map ACP ls tools to LS so listings render as reads, not shell commands
- fix(cursor): surface ACP plan updates on the live todo panel
- feat(chat): mount the Vue transcript island; flip streaming to data-only (imperative renderer dead, deleted next)
- fix(cursor): map the Auto selection to Cursor's advertised default sentinel
- feat(cursor): make .cursor/skills project skills editable in the Library
- fix(cursor): keep the advertised model catalog when session/load returns none
- test(chat): characterize subagent reactive-data population during streaming
- fix(cursor): serialize turns until the prior prompt settles so cancelled requests stay isolated
- feat(cursor): discover Cursor Agent Skills read-only in the Library
- fix(codex): split runnable skill listing from the settings management listing
- feat(chat): add per-tab mountTranscript seam + integration test (unwired)
- refactor(chat): extract image-attachment src/modal helpers as survive-the-cut util
- fix(codex): drop disabled read-only globals from the runnable skills listing
- refactor(chat): streaming indicator flags + duration data become reactive
- fix(cursor): schema-correct task ack, defensive generate_image handler, provider doc notes
- fix(codex): keep disabled vault skills editable and path-free read-only ids
- test(chat): characterize reactive tool-call streaming data
- fix(cursor)!: reuse loaded sessions and ack cursor/task — capture-verified, with real fixtures
- refactor(chat): text/thinking coordinators grow reactive content blocks
- feat(codex): surface user/global Codex skills read-only in the Library
- feat(chat): InlineAskUserQuestion + InlineApproval Vue cards (unwired)
- feat(skills): Library refresh button + guard running user skills when the runtime can't resolve them
- feat(chat): InlineExitPlanMode + InlinePlanApproval + choice-list Vue cards (unwired)
- fix(skills): bump skill-index cache schema so user skills aren't served stale in the Library
- feat(chat): StreamingIndicator reactive Vue component (unwired)
- feat(chat): MessageList windowing + welcome/load-earlier + TranscriptRoot (unwired)
- feat(chat): BlockList dispatch + MessageBubble shell Vue components (unwired)
- feat(chat): MessageActionBar Vue component (unwired)
- feat(chat): work-order cards + context card + images + runtime-error Vue components (unwired)
- feat(chat): SubagentBlock Vue component (sync + async) (unwired)
- feat(chat): WriteEditView + DiffView Vue components (unwired)
- fix(cursor): variant matcher rejects unrequested thinking/fast axes
- fix(quickActions): don't show a dead "Edit in Claude settings" button for read-only user skills
- feat(chat): ToolCall + Todo/WebSearch/AskQuestion-result Vue views (unwired)
- fix(claude): list both personal and project skills on name collision; keep manager to vault entries
- fix(cursor): short-circuit stale or pre-cancelled ask_question requests
- fix(claude): personal skills shadow same-named vault skills (match Claude precedence)
- feat(chat): TextBlock + ThinkingBlock + compact-boundary Vue blocks (unwired)
- refactor(claude): drop loadUserSettings gate on user-skill discovery; redact home paths from cache
- feat(chat): transcript callbacks seam + event-routing composable (unwired)
- fix(cursor): session-guard the blocking plan card + match compound model variants
- feat(chat): MarkdownHost async-markdown seam with generation token (unwired)
- fix(claude): route registry toggle through invalidation + clear persisted skill index
- feat(chat): transcript Pinia factory + reactive store (unwired)
- docs: transcript rendering Vue migration implementation plan
- fix(cursor): cancelled turns beat yolo auto-approval for late permission requests
- fix(claude): invalidate cached user skills when loadUserSettings toggles
- docs: transcript rendering Vue migration design spec
- feat(cursor): ACP diagnostics capture — setting, runtime wiring, open-folder command, validation step 0
- feat(claude): discover read-only user (~/.claude/skills) skills
- Migrate the chat sidepanel shell to a Vue 3 + Pinia island (#484)
- feat(cursor): ACP capture writer — redacted wire/lifecycle/stderr session files
- feat(transport): optional wire-frame and stderr diagnostics taps
- docs(plan): Cursor ACP capture implementation plan (3 TDD tasks)
- docs(spec): Cursor ACP diagnostics capture design (brainstorm-validated)
- fix(cursor): approve-new-session stops the current plan turn + carries inline plan text forward
- docs: plan-mode flow reflects the blocking create_plan decision
- fix(cursor)!: block create_plan on the user's plan decision + honor cancel during turn setup
- fix(cursor): persist cancel abort through turn end, patch status-only todo merges, map write kind
- fix(cursor): arm plan turns only on applied mode + rebuild reclassified edit blocks
- fix(cursor): keep cancel escalation armed until the prompt settles
- fix(cursor): propagate corrected tool kinds to rendered calls + session-guard plan metadata
- fix(cursor): merge incremental todo updates + resolve pending approvals on cancel
- docs(tech-debt): fallow coverage-model divergence + ACP scaffolding consolidation trigger
- test(cursor): scripted fake-ACP-server stream tests + extension session guard + empty-plan gate
- fix(cursor): review-pass hardening — cancel escalation, lossy input merge, variant-exact model match, mode/usage/plan gates
- fix(cursor): normalize ACP todo updates so the shared panel accepts them
- fix(cursor): advertised model ids, real plan-content gate, restore runtime coverage floors
- fix(quality): pin baseline to fresh-environment measurement (231/1)
- fix(cursor): map file-mutating kinds first, surface ACP edit diffs, dedupe crash errors
- fix(cursor): preserve delete tool identity + canonicalize ACP file-tool inputs
- fix(cursor): answer ask_question/create_plan with the documented ACP outcome unions
- docs: Cursor runs on first-party ACP — CLAUDE.md, ADR-0002 superseded, install manual, settings note
- fix(cursor): honor forced ACP restarts + preserve authoritative context usage
- fix(cursor): reset mode cache per session, abort ask prompts on cancel, prefer one-turn yolo grants
- feat(cursor)!: delete the one-shot stream-json chat path (hard cutover)
- fix(cursor): ACP runtime review findings — history bootstrap, model apply, boundary dedup, plan gate, lifecycle tests
- feat(cursor)!: rewrite chat runtime on first-party ACP (agent acp)
- fix(quality): restore complexFunctions baseline to the cache-free measure (233)
- feat(cursor): agent-acp launch plumbing with Windows-safe spawn passthrough
- fix(cursor): tolerant ask_question parsing — malformed payloads degrade to rejected, not RPC errors
- feat(cursor): ACP dialect extensions — in-turn ask_question, create_plan, todos
- feat(cursor): ACP mode mapping and prompt block builder
- fix(cursor): wire ACP canonical tool names + clear quality-gate regressions
- feat(cursor): ACP tool-name normalization adapter
- chore(quality): accept 0.1 averageMaintainability dip from the ACP helper extraction
- refactor(acp): lift provider-agnostic turn-effect, approval mapping, and stream queue out of opencode
- docs(plan): Cursor ACP runtime hard-cutover implementation plan
- docs(spec): Cursor ACP runtime hard-cutover design (brainstorm-validated)
- fix(library): popout-safe glyph mount in IconButton
- fix(tasks): seed skip chips from the runner map on board load
- fix(tasks): surface board load failures in the notices block
- fix(tasks): prune stale pause overlays on board load
- docs: unblock the Cursor ACP migration — first-party ACP shipped
- fix(cursor): thread the resolved CLI path into enhanced-PATH construction
- fix(cursor): stop re-emitting committed text and false-dropping genuine repeats
- fix(tasks): re-seed reply input when the pause default arrives late
- perf(tasks): refresh toolbar without re-indexing on queue ticks
- fix(tasks): prune stale skip chips on board load
- chore(tasks): lift AgentBoardView LOC ceiling for the roster fix
- fix(tasks): bump roster version after the persona cache is refreshed
- fix(tasks): reconcile stale live overlays on board load
- fix(tasks): repaint card assignee persona on roster:changed
- fix(tasks): render Vue board icons in Obsidian popout windows
- fix(tasks): resync lane criteria on reset + evict live overlay on terminal status
- docs(tasks): Agent Board Vue migration — rename cardActions, adopt vueIsland in detail modal, CLAUDE.md/ADR/plan, ratchet re-lock
- feat(tasks): AgentBoardLaneEditor internals → Vue island; share the island + row atoms
- feat(tasks): WorkOrderTemplateEditorModal internals → Vue island
- refactor(tasks): detail-modal polish — EditableChip prop, MarkdownHost lifecycle, comment
- fix(tasks): reload Vue board on archive-rename-out + preserve board-config warnings
- feat(tasks): WorkOrderDetailModal internals → Vue island; delete imperative sub-panels
- feat(tasks): cut Agent Board over to the Vue root; delete imperative renderer + patch machinery
- feat(tasks): complete Vue board toolbar chrome + store toolbar-state projection (unwired)
- feat(tasks): Vue card reply surface + pause overlay + skip chip (unwired)
- feat(tasks): Vue card action cluster + overflow teleport over CARD_ACTIONS (unwired)
- feat(tasks): Vue board components (root/toolbar/lane/card/live-strip), characterization-tested, unwired
- feat(tasks): board EventBus→store routing composable (unwired)
- feat(tasks): useAgentBoardStore layout projection + live setters (unwired)
- docs: Agent Board Vue 3 + Pinia migration implementation plan
- fix(library): route loop refresh reload through withErrorNotice
- refactor(library): extract shared folder vault-refresh composable
- fix(library): refresh the Agents tab on external roster changes
- docs: Agent Board Vue 3 + Pinia migration design spec
- fix(library): refresh the Loops tab on external vault writes
- feat(library): shared IconButton atom; adopt it for the favorite star
- docs(product): add Marketplace PRD for Quick Actions/Agents/Loops/Templates catalog
- fix(library): render the Quick Actions favorite star as a sized icon-button
- refactor(library): extract the guarded-load dance shared by the four stores
- fix(library): merge library reloads by identity to stop mutation flicker
- fix(library): keep roster delete's reload alive when projection cleanup throws for the agent detail Delete
- update use-case-map quick-action with canvas instructions, add quick-action to skill qa
- add use-case-map quick-action
- fix(library): real mtimes behind the Quick Actions recently-updated sort
- fix(library): refresh the Quick Actions tab on external vault writes
- fix(skills): treat provider catalog refresh as best-effort after vault writes
- docs: ADR + docs sweep for the library consolidation
- feat(library): Quick Actions tab with full management
- feat(library): quick-action store with duplicate/favorite/delete flows
- feat(library): single Open Library ribbon and unified commands
- docs: plan Task 6 sweep gains the dead-but-kept modal rules (Task 2 spec-review note)
- docs: plan Task 6 sweep gains the orphaned agent-settings CSS rule (Task 2 observation)
- chore(library): prune legacy-only library CSS and list DOM helpers
- test(library): drop vestigial setViewState mocks and a migration-era comment
- docs: plan Task 2 gains the libraryNav.ts deletion (spec-review finding)
- feat(library)!: remove the useVueLibrary flag and the three legacy library views
- docs: library consolidation implementation plan (6 tasks)
- docs: consolidation spec — plugin is published, no v4.0.0 milestone to defer to
- docs: library consolidation design spec (hard cut, single ribbon, Quick Actions tab)
- fix(loops): move the tags input into the loop editor's top metadata section
- fix(library): busy state + double-fire guard for async card actions
- fix(skills): harden delete/clone path validation to the <root>/<name>/SKILL.md shape
- feat(skills): clone vault skills regardless of provider
- feat(library): delete vault skills from the Skills tab
- update docs properties
- tweaked execution hint
- fix(roster): pin the detail-editor footer flush to the pane bottom
- fix(roster): dedupe same-named cross-provider skills in the detail editor picker
- docs: Vue style baseline — style guide, quality gates, architecture notes
- quality: namespace guard + .vue-aware !important ratchet + Vue marker artifact checks
- feat(library): fork panel styles to the Vue namespace; drop the legacy vue-root rule
- feat(library): fork card, avatar, and empty-state styles into scoped SFC blocks
- fix(library): keep Obsidian button styling live on nav items and filterchips
- docs: fold research follow-ups into style-baseline spec + plan
- docs(research): Obsidian CSS inventory + isolation techniques for Vue islands
- feat(library): fork nav + toolbar styles into scoped SFC blocks
- feat(style): shared Vue atoms vocabulary (panel scaffold, card slots, chips)
- feat(style): Vue island baseline — --sp-* tokens, reset, library host rules
- docs: Vue style baseline implementation plan (7 tasks)
- fix(library): arm the detail-editor tab guard before awaiting render
- docs: Vue style baseline design spec (reset, --sp-* tokens, dedicated Library styles)
- quality: lock Vue coverage floors, artifact marker, and docs for the library pilot
- feat(library): Agents tab — useRosterStore + AgentsPanel with detail-editor handoff
- feat(library): Skills tab — useSkillLibraryStore + SkillsPanel with prompt/clone/create parity
- feat(library): Loops tab — useLoopLibraryStore + LoopsPanel with search/tags/clone/prompt parity
- docs(plan): aria-pressed ternary (vue-tsc Booleanish typing) — sync with shipped LibraryToolbar
- feat(library): shared Vue atoms — toolbar, interactive card, empty state
- feat(library): extract pure list engine and add reactive useLibraryList composable
- feat(library): unified Vue LibraryView behind useVueLibrary (per-leaf island, tab shell, redirects, leak guard)
- feat(settings): add useVueLibrary flag (default off) with toggle and i18n
- quality: count .vue sources in the LOC ratchet
- lint: lint .vue SFCs (essential=error, recommended=warn backlog, no-v-html=error)
- test: add Vitest lane for the Vue surface (jsdom, obsidian alias, coverage floors, CI job)
- docs(plan): rollback QA expects tab-matching legacy view (Codex review)
- quality: extract merge-vue-sfc-styles to scripts/, resolve dead-dep flags
- build: settle Node engine floor at 22.13 (lockfile-wide max); docs(plan): pass required AvatarSlot size prop
- build: raise Node engine floor to 22.12 (vite 8 / @vitejs/plugin-vue engines)
- docs(plan): ignore coverage-vue/ in git and fallow (Codex review)
- build: add vue-tsc --noEmit as a second typecheck gate for SFCs
- build: add Vue 3 toolchain deps and esbuild SFC wiring (unplugin-vue, feature-flag defines, styles merge)
- docs(plan): tab-aware rollback redirect and concrete discard-confirm strings (Codex review)
- docs(plan): guard tab switches against discarding dirty agent edits (Codex review)
- docs(plan): define onStartChat wrapper, stage AgentDetailEditor in Task 12 commit (Codex review)
- docs(plan): panel imports AvatarSlot, drops avatar helpers now internal to it
- docs(plan): AvatarSlot re-renders on agent prop change (Codex review)
- docs(plan): detail-save store refresh, SFC TS lint parity, Promise<void> wrapper (Codex review)
- docs(plan): source-based useLibraryList for multi-leaf consistency (Codex review)
- docs(plan): SFC-script safety-rule parity, multi-word root SFC, stage snapshots (Codex review)
- docs(plan): make useVueLibrary optional to avoid breaking settings fixtures (Codex review)
- docs(plan): stage Jest stub with the LibraryView commit, share the panel-backend fake, hoist the editor spy (Codex review)
- docs(plan): fold in adversarial verification findings (7 blockers, 3 major, 1 minor)
- docs(plan): re-sync the agents list after card delete (Codex review)
- docs(plan): route all agent deletes through a confirmed helper (Codex review)
- docs(plan): agents clone must open the detail editor on the clone (Codex review)
- docs(plan): fix duplicate open-loop-library command registration (Codex review)
- docs(plan): implementation plan for the Vue 3 + Pinia harness and unified Library pilot
- docs(spec): Vue 3 + Pinia harness and unified Library pilot design
- docs(research): Vue 3 + Pinia frontend refactor research and decisions

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Luis85/specorator/compare/1.2.1...1.2.2

releases.author: Luis85
releases.description:
## What's Changed
- chore(release): 1.2.1
- test(fileLink): anchor vault resolution tests on a real tmp dir
- refactor(chat): move composer-clear helper to composerSendPhases to satisfy LOC ratchet
- fix(quick-actions): fold unsent composer draft into chat-header quick action sends
- docs: link canonical Obsidian plugin directory URL
- docs: update install instructions for official marketplace listing

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Luis85/specorator/compare/1.2.0...1.2.1

releases.author: Luis85
releases.description:
## What's Changed
- chore(release): 1.2.0
- Library views overhaul: search, tags, QoL, and in-library prompting (#472)
- fix(agents): carry bound roster-agent persona through prepared-turn query path
- docs(quality): log run 24 — StreamController text render coordinator
- chore(quality): re-lock StreamController LOC baseline (964 -> 774)
- refactor(chat): extract TextRenderCoordinator + shared StreamRenderLoop
- chore(quality): re-lock LOC baselines for stateful decompositions + log run 23
- refactor(chat): extract ThinkingRenderCoordinator from StreamController
- refactor(tasks): extract live-heartbeat tracker from AgentBoardView
- refactor(codex): extract file-change accumulator from CodexNotificationRouter
- chore(quality): re-lock LOC baseline for round-3 broad pass + log run 22
- refactor(chat): extract codeBlockFormatter from MessageRenderer
- refactor(cursor): extract input-mapping + value coercers from cursorToolNormalization
- chore(quality): re-lock baselines for round-2 hotspot decomposition + log run 21
- refactor(chat): extract pure result-parsing helpers from SubagentManager
- refactor(chat): extract web-search renderer + line primitive from ToolCallRenderer
- refactor(chat): extract ask-user-question renderer from ToolCallRenderer
- refactor(app): extract view + chat-action registration from main.ts
- refactor(app): extract RosterAgentService from main.ts
- chore(quality): re-lock LOC baseline for split hotspots + log campaign run 18
- refactor(opencode): extract OpencodeSupportedCommandsRegistry from runtime
- refactor(chat): extract ResumeSessionDropdownCoordinator from InputController
- docs(quality): codify clean-code refactoring guidelines + sharpen refactor presets
- refactor(quality): recover ratchet regression + consolidate same-zone clones
- docs(product): convert wikilinks to relative markdown links
- fix(agents): persona replaces base identity when bound

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Luis85/specorator/compare/1.1.0...1.2.0

## What's Changed
- chore(release): 1.1.0
- fix(cursor): drop unused rest-sibling binding in mcp cleanup
- fix(tasks): open work-order modal instead of note when promoting from chat
- feat(tasks): move WO edit Cancel/Save beside Open note
- fix(cursor): strip stale specorator entry from ~/.cursor/mcp.json on spawn
- style(container): triple visibility utilities to beat header tab-bar rule
- style: remove !important from inline-edit and container CSS
- test(logging): make logging coverage self-sufficient
- feat(tasks): footer edit actions + modal on WO create
- style(chat): badge + floating popover styles for edited files
- feat(chat): edited-files badge + floating popover (replace chip strip)
- i18n(chat): add edited-files badge keys (created/edited/group labels)
- docs(chat): implementation plan for edited-files badge
- docs(chat): spec edited-files badge + floating popover
- docs(css): correct library-views comment count after tool view removal
- chore: drop tool library i18n/styles, refresh baselines, document removal
- refactor: remove user tool library feature and unwire tool-grant plumbing
- revert: undo premature 1.13 settings migration (restore <=1.12.x compat)
- docs: plan revert of 1.13 settings migration + tool library removal
- chore: migrate 1.13 deprecations and tighten review guards
- fix: resolve marketplace validator type-safety + CSS findings
- chore: resolve Obsidian marketplace review findings

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Luis85/specorator/compare/1.0.0...1.1.0
